comments: Booked him in for an inspection today, seller rings me earlier saying the inspection was done and what does she do next. I looked at the booking but the inspection hadn't been started (this is at about 9am). Then Becca rings him about 30 mins ago asking for the report, and he tells her 'I'm at an appointment currently she rings him again about 5 mins ago and he said the car never came in. Becca tells him that we are aware that the seller brought the vehicle in this morning and he has to ask around, turns out she came in paid for a rego and then left. Obviously the seller just assumes they've also done the inspection as it was booked in but they didn't and just sends her on her way. He tries to blame the seller so Becca said well it's not just on the seller, you also knew this booking was happening and should've known the car that was being inspected. He then shouts back to her saying "TAKE IT SOMEWHERE ELSE IF YOU'RE GOING TO SPEAK TO ME LIKE THAT" and hangs up the phone
